scripts.test:hmr-leakage: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @fixtures/vite-csr build && pnpm --filter @fixtures/vite-nitro-v3 build && pnpm --filter @fixtures/vite-library build && pnpm --filter @fixtures/rolldown-library build && node scripts/check-hmr-leakage.mjs
scripts.test:hmr-browser: node scripts/with-lock.mjs hmr-smoke "pnpm build && node scripts/smoke-vite-csr-hmr.mjs"
scripts.test:hmr-attribute: node scripts/with-lock.mjs hmr-smoke "pnpm build && node scripts/smoke-vite-csr-attribute-hmr.mjs"
scripts.test:hmr-nitro: node scripts/with-lock.mjs hmr-smoke "pnpm build && node scripts/smoke-vite-nitro-hmr.mjs"
scripts.test:workerd: pnpm build && pnpm --dir fixtures/vite-workerd build && node scripts/smoke-vite-workerd-hmr.mjs
